metadata.name: Schedule a Future User Job
metadata.description: Schedule commands to run at one specified future time using the at command
objectives: Schedule a job to run at a specified future time
Inspect the commands that a scheduled job runs

tasks.name: Verify myjob.txt file was created
tasks.description: The /home/student/myjob.txt file should exist from the scheduled job
tasks.failure_message: myjob.txt file not found - the scheduled job may not have run yet
hints: Schedule the job: echo 'date >> /home/student/myjob.txt' | at now +2min
Wait for the job to execute (2 minutes)

tasks.name: Verify myjob.txt contains date output
tasks.description: The myjob.txt file should contain output from the date command
tasks.failure_message: myjob.txt is empty or does not contain expected content
hints: The job should append date output to myjob.txt

tasks.name: Verify teatime job was removed
tasks.description: The job scheduled for teatime (16:00) should have been removed with atrm
tasks.success_message: No jobs in queue g (teatime job removed)
tasks.failure_message: Jobs still exist in queue g - teatime job was not removed
hints: Jobs in queue g were scheduled with: at -q g teatime

tasks.name: Verify cookies job exists in queue b
tasks.description: The job scheduled for 16:05 in queue b should still exist
tasks.success_message: Cookies job exists in queue b
tasks.failure_message: No jobs found in queue b - cookies job may have been removed or already run
hints: Then enter: echo 'The cookies are good' >> /home/student/cookies.txt
